content_body: What a fabulous getaway we've had! This home is simply perfect and we feel blessed to have spent 4 relaxing, adventurous, fun, cozy, peaceful days here. The view is mesmerizing and we often caught ourselves just staring, lost in thought (Like, "Do I really have to go home"). We ventured out and walked the train tracks, we did some fly fishing (well actually a lot of Fly Fishing), Robert pulled out a fish the size of a golden retriever...unfortunately it got away before we could take a picture. The train is charming and we enjoyed waving to the passengers as they rolled by. The only way to have made our stay better - would be to extend it! We look forward to returning again and again.
title: Relaxation & Adventures Happen at Fallen Timber Lodge
